title: UPDATE - Insigneo unveils new version of its brand, highlighting its accelerated growth across the Americas
author: Not Specified
description: Insigneo, an international wealth management firm, has unveiled a new brand identity with the tagline 'Your Passport to Possibilities' to reflect its growth and market position. The firm now manages over $33 billion in assets through a network of 500+ investment professionals serving approximately 32,000 clients across the Americas.

title: New Crypto Pepeto Exchange Upgrade Reaches Binance Level While Ethereum Price Prediction Asks if ETH Can Hit $3,000 This Month
author: Not Specified
description: Pepeto, an Ethereum-based exchange, completed a major upgrade reaching $9.86 million in presale funding with zero-cost trading and AI contract scanning. BNY Mellon announced Bitcoin and Ethereum custody services in Abu Dhabi, supporting institutional adoption. Ethereum currently trades at $2,291, down 54% from its August 2025 peak, with various price predictions ranging from $3,000 by end of May to $10,000-$11,000 by 2030.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Announcement of regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum custody services in Abu Dhabi demonstrates institutional confidence in crypto assets and signals mainstream financial sector adoption, which supports broader market growth.

title: Wall Street Hits New Records, Oil Surges On Hormuz Toll Drama: What's Moving Markets Thursday?
author: Piero Cingari
description: U.S. equities reached all-time highs on Thursday as President Trump announced a 10-day ceasefire between Israeli and Lebanese leaders. The S&P 500 advanced to 7,038.57 (+0.2%), while the Nasdaq 100 rallied 0.6% to 26,359 on its 12th straight session of gains. Oil prices surged on Iran's Hormuz toll legislation, with WTI crude jumping 2.5% to $93.58. Energy and technology sectors led gains, though healthcare stocks declined following weak guidance from Abbott Laboratories.

title: BNY Declares Dividends
author: Prnewswire
description: Bank of New York Mellon Corporation announced dividend declarations on its common and preferred stock. The common stock dividend is $0.53 per share, payable May 8, 2026. Multiple series of preferred stock dividends were also declared with varying amounts per share, payable in June 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared dividends on both common and preferred stock, demonstrating financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend declarations are typically viewed positively as they indicate stable earnings and management confidence in the company's financial position.

title: Investment Monitoring Service Analysis Report 2026: $2.7 Bn Market Opportunities, Trends, Competitive Landscape, Strategies, and Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The investment monitoring service market is projected to grow from $1.68 billion in 2025 to $2.7 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 9.9%. Growth is driven by AI-driven risk analytics, cloud-based platforms, real-time portfolio analytics, and increased institutional and retail investments. Key players include JPMorgan Chase, Deloitte, Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs, and BlackRock, with North America leading and Asia-Pacific as the fastest-growing region.
